content.text: We just launched v2.0! Check out the new features.

content.title: Build beautiful websites faster
content.subtitle: The modern wireframe builder that helps you create pixel-perfect designs in minutes, not hours.

content.title: Everything you need to ship faster
content.subtitle: Our platform provides all the tools you need to design, build, and deploy.

features.title: Drag & Drop Builder
features.description: Visually build your pages with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface.

features.title: AI-Powered Content
features.description: Generate copy and layouts instantly with our AI assistant.

features.title: Export Anywhere
features.description: Export to HTML, Figma, or your favorite framework.

content.title: Designed for modern teams
content.subtitle: Every feature is crafted to help your team move faster.

features.title: Real-time Collaboration
features.description: Work together with your team in real-time. See changes as they happen and leave feedback directly on the canvas.

features.title: Version History
features.description: Never lose your work. Every change is tracked and you can restore any previous version with a single click.

content.title: Powerful integrations
content.subtitle: Connect with the tools you already use.

features.title: Figma Sync
features.description: Export your designs directly to Figma with pixel-perfect accuracy.

features.title: GitHub Deploy
features.description: Push your code to GitHub and deploy automatically.

features.title: Slack Notifications
features.description: Get notified about changes and feedback in Slack.

content.title: Simple, transparent pricing
content.subtitle: Choose the plan that works best for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial.

plans.name: Pro
plans.features: Unlimited projects, All exports, Priority support, AI assistant

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.features: Everything in Pro, Custom branding, SSO, Dedicated support

testimonials.quote: Structr has completely transformed how we design. We ship 3x faster now.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: The Figma export alone is worth the price. Pixel-perfect every time.
testimonials.author: Marcus Johnson

testimonials.quote: Simple, powerful, and beautifully designed. Our whole team loves it.
testimonials.author: Emily Rodriguez

content.title: Frequently asked questions
content.subtitle: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team.

questions.question: How do I get started?
questions.answer: Simply sign up for a free account and follow our getting started guide. You'll be building your first page in under 5 minutes.

questions.question: Is there a free trial?
questions.answer: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required.

questions.question: Can I export to Figma?
questions.answer: Absolutely. Our Figma plugin lets you export your wireframes with pixel-perfect accuracy, including design tokens and variables.

questions.question: Can I cancel anytime?
questions.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time with no penalties or hidden fees.

content.title: Ready to build something amazing?
content.subtitle: Join thousands of designers and developers who ship faster with Structr.

content.title: Design meets development
content.subtitle: Bridge the gap between design and code with our visual builder.

content.title: Ship beautiful pages in minutes
content.subtitle: From wireframe to production in record time.

content.title: Get in touch
content.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

content.description: The modern wireframe builder for teams.
